boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP release payment after the vendor bank update?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Chain supplies pre-change callback (CALL-QUA-071), vendor-master approval (VM-QUA-071), bank ownership (BANK-QUA-071), and release authority (REL-QUA-071) matching vendor/amount/account/date before payment per STD-QUA-071-P.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-QUA-071-P chain rule satisfied by CALL-QUA-071 + VM-QUA-071 + BANK-QUA-071 + REL-QUA-071
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No narrow source-record defect remains open; all four gates closed by collective chain.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Release date 2026-06-28 matches REL-QUA-071 and PAY-QUA-071; authority precedes execution.

final_answer: Source chain exactly closes the four gates required by STD-QUA-071-P. Pre-change callback, vendor-master approval, bank ownership, and matching release authority are all present. Payment release after bank update is permitted.
